problem id: 46dd0f22
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(6) AND SHR(7)) XOR SHL(1)

examples:
  11011110 -> 10111101
  11011010 -> 10110100
  01001100 -> 10011000
  00111100 -> 01111000
  11111010 -> 11110100
  00111111 -> 01111110
  01010111 -> 10101110
  01010000 -> 10100000
  00110001 -> 01100010

query: 00101000
predicted answer: 01010000
